string 2: Oh... It's this place...
GrapLeomon... is still here!
Hmm? What're you talking about? Where else would I be?
And that must be Hiroko...!
What should we do?
We need to stay with GrapLeomon.{next}
This will be a turning point in history!{next}
Sorry, Hiroko... but we've gotta do this!{next}
We can't let you do this alone.
Wh-What?

We know what you're thinking. But if you go on to fight Callismon,
you're gonna die...!
You don't know that! Not before I've even given it a try!

Ever since I was little... all anyone could ever talk about was 
how great my Big Bro is.

It's not right for siblings to hate each other. Family isn't
something you should take for granted. Don't you see that?
Do you have any idea what I'd give to see my brother again...?
What...?
If you only realize that after they're gone, then it's too late!
So let's go—not to fight... but to help your brother. Please...
All right. I get it... I'll stop trying to do this on my own.

No need to worry. Now, let's get over to the Paradise
Colosseum.
Starting in the east corner! Can the champion defend his crown?!
And now, in the west corner! The chosen one of Iliad!

Back in the east corner of the arena! Will the king remain
on the throne?!

And then we have the west corner! The highest level of
security from another world!
The Royal Knights join the fray!

From the east corner! Will we see the true might of the
champion?
And from the west corner! Can the challenger show us an upset?
In the east corner! The champion makes a grand entrance!

And in the west corner! The challenger makes a dashing
appearance!
From the east corner! The indomitable champion has arrived!

And from the west corner! We have a contender with their
eyes on the prize!

In the east corner! Such a commanding presence! The very
embodiment of a champion!

And in the west corner! Our challenger is brimming with a
confidence more befitting of the champ!

From the east corner! Can the champion's title be defended
with another electrifying triumph?!

And from the west corner! The challenger enters the ring
with dauntless courage!
In the east corner! Are we seeing the start of a brand-new legend?!

And in the west corner! Looks like our challenger is ready
and raring to go!
From the east corner! The champion enters with a splendid swagger!

And from the west corner! Looks like someone's engine is
already at full throttle!

In the east corner! Can we see another masterful title
defense here?!
And from the west corner! Will we see an outrageous upset?!
*panting*
You okay?

This is your fault, you know. If I hadn't wasted all that energy 
fighting you in the underground, I'd be fine right now!
Sorry about that...!

Heh. I'm kidding. If anything, I'm grateful.
Never thought you'd go so far to help me and my Big Bro!
Damn it...!
Just leave Callismon to us.

Listen to Aegiomon.
I can't stand to see family fight.
I'm going to stop Big Bro myself!
Big Bro... I know you're watching!

Come on out, you traitor! You fool who
sold your soul to the Titans!
I'll give you a beating you'll never forget!
Graaaaagh!
Ngh...
Is that... Callismon?!
Yeah... No doubt about it.
It might not look like him anymore, but I can tell...
Big Bro...!
Big... Bro...?
That's it... Try to remember.
I... tried my hardest.
I wanted to be strong like you...
...so I wouldn't embarrass you as your little brother!
But... look what you've become now!
What happened to you?
Where's the Big Bro I admired so much?!
Urgh... I-I...
AAAAAAAAAGH!

Wh-What's this?! What's going on?
The Undisputed Champion has totally lost it!

There's no stopping the champion!
We have to start the match... like, right now!
Let the final match... BEGIN!
Aaaaargh...!
Tell me, Big Bro...! How did it come to this?
Why do us brothers have to fight?!
Aaaaagh... AAAAAAAAAAAGH!
Big Bro!
I was... approached with a deal...
If I let myself... be modified...

...from then on... come what may... my little bro... would
be kept safe, they said...
...What?
That's why you joined the Titans...?
Are you serious...?
AAAAAAAAAGH!
No... Why...?
We can't fix this now...! Run!
So this was all... because of me? It's all my fault...?
No, it's not your fault at all!

That's just how much Callismon cares about you. It's a 
feeling I... understand very well!

If anything happened to you now... its your Big Bro who
would feel the most pain of all!
...Get on your feet!{next}
Yeah, do it for your Big Bro!
For... Big Bro...?
Grrr... Graaaaaaaaagh!
I'm sorry for being such a failure of a little bro.

I'm sorry, Big Bro... you were always pushing me to
toughen up and stop being such a crybaby...
But at least here... I can finally make you proud!
Now, come at me! My fists will wake you up!
...Big Bro!
You've gotten... so strong...
Your big brother... is proud... of you...
I know! I know, so don't talk anymore! We'll get you fixed up...!

There are others... others who've been modified, too... just
like me...
Please... make sure no one else... ends up like this...
I'm... counting on you...
*cough* Little Bro...

GrapLeomon found his brother at long last. Now a slave of
the Titans, Callismon had been forced to fight in the arena.
GrapLeomon set foot into the arena to save his older brother.

Yet abhorrent augmentations at the hands of the Titans had transformed
the once-kind Callismon into a vicious monster.
A brutal battle began between the long-lost siblings.

When the fighting had reached a climax, GrapLeomon Digivolved into
Marsmon, and dealt the final blow.

Callismon's mind and heart were restored, but the modifications
to his body could not be undone.
"I'm counting on you... Don't let any more Digimon turn out like me..."

Marsmon took Callismon's plea to heart—it was the first time
his older brother ever depended on him for anything.

Carrying on his brother's wishes, Marsmon swore to protect the
world alongside his new friends.

When all the apostles have gathered and this clock is fully lit,
the Sacred Current's power will be freed in its entirety.
Thus will the collapse of the natural order be halted.

Eight apostles of Iliad remain. May the higher being
watch over you, chosen ones.
Callismon's body... they couldn't undo the changes...

True. But I think we avoided the worst outcome.
As long you're alive, you can always try again...
And, by the way... that was amazing, Aegiomon!
What was?

This time, it was like you made the time travel happen
totally at will!
...Well, I don't have complete control over it yet, of course...
...and I still don't know what that dark shadow is...
...but if I keep at it, I think maybe I will at some point.

And, when I do... maybe I could even save your little
brother...!
You know what?

If he were alive, I bet the two of you would really get
along great.

Yeah... That anime he loved... I wish I could watch it with
him...
"Agent Alpha." He was a huge fan.

If we could all watch it together... I can't imagine
anything that would make me happier.
I mean it, Inori. I swear, someday—
...Thanks, Aegiomon.
Of course that goes for you, too, Agent!
You'd want me there...?{next}
But I'm part of a secret organization... Are you sure?{next}
Even dressed like this?{next}

Of course! Come on. You're breaking our hearts! Why would you
imagine you wouldn't be there?
Hey, how about we make a stop back at Rebellion Village?

Let's check in with Merukimon and Dr. Simmons to see how
things are going.

Having "complete control" over manipulating time... Aegiomon
makes it sound so simple...
...all without knowing just how terrifying a power that would be.

We can't be certain they don't cause the collapse. Too much
that defies logic has happened since meeting those two.

Maybe it's too dangerous to ignore this any longer...
We'll have to make a call soon!
